programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: In the UK's sunniest place, Susan explores the beautiful golden pier, visits Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway, and meets up with Aled Jones who shares childhood seaside memories.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Wolves in the Wood is an initiative designed to encourage children to engage in outdoor play. Through mixed-age learning, creativity and freedom, the project nurtures confidence.

programme.title: Michael Portillo in Stockholm
programme.desc: Michael joins fans at a game of bandy - similar to ice hockey but played lightning fast with a ball - and visits the landmark City Hall with its stunning gold mosaics.

programme.title: Warship: Life in the Royal Navy
programme.desc: Kate Humble takes on a terrifying course that submariners must complete before heading to sea - including training for when stranded at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: The Betrayal of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: Inside The Tower of London Special. Actor Jason Watkins and historian Tracy Borman set out to answer one of British history's most enduring mysteries: who really betrayed Anne Boleyn.

programme.title: Trauma Room One
programme.desc: Welcome to Trauma Room One, where the world's best medics face extreme surgeries, and death is only ever a millimetre away. David faces brain surgery that must happen while he's awake.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: A man is rushed to hospital with a mysterious illness. The police suspect he has been poisoned by medicine he bought online. The coroner investigates to find out what really happened.

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Compelling documentary series lifting the lid on the night shift in A&E. A man is brought in by the police having escaped a mental unit, and a cigarette filter causes problems.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Presenter Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Portsmouth treasure hunting with Michael and his wife Marissa.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Kent, treasure hunting with Lorraine and her daughter Shelley.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey takes to wearing a shoulder bag.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship becomes less of a secret. Ross is keen to rent the apartment facing Monica's and Rachel's.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: From the misty mountains of Sa Pa to the jam-packed city of Hanoi, Nick discovers a Vietnam that is developing fast and thriving. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a picnic adventure but don't know the food that is offered to them. Will they find another way to enjoy the unfamiliar food? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum's magic licence is out of date and she must pass a test set by the Wise Old Elf before she can get a new one. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Grandpa Pig puts up a tent in his garden, Peppa and her friends put on a circus.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa teases George for having a baby's tricycle, but then the other children point out that Peppa's own bike isn't that grown-up.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Drops of water are falling from the ceiling onto the floor! Fluff is fascinated by water, but he does not want to get wet! Can they find a way to catch the drops and stay dry.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: While drumming in the treehouse, Squiggle spots a butterfly, but loud noises scare it away. To see it again, they must learn to be very quiet. Shhh.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends: Extraordinary Engines
programme.desc: Hugo is one of the most unusual engines ever to come to Sodor. The other engines fear that he will take over, and refuse to even to talk to him.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Professor Pickles attempts to create an EPIC historical walking trail, but he creates emergency of EPIC proportions instead.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep some old photographs from when they were babies.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: ...Inventor. Paddington accepts an inventor's award for Simi when she's too shy to step up, but why does she then feel jealous and sad.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: While the group are playing witches, Posy and Jamila concoct a secret potion. Pip gets carried away with the game, pouring the potion out, which upsets Posy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Bed. Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing in their clubhouse. The Clubhouse has a fold down counter at the front. The children pretend to be a little shop for the parents to buy things from.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan finds a treasure map in a bottle on the beach. Could it really lead to finding the lost treasure of dread pirate Abby Birdy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: After Chickaletta accidentally takes flight on a toy airplane, it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue her.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark are district nurses and get on their bike to look after the residents of Milotown. But they fail to listen to their patients as well as they should.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum's magic licence is out of date and she must pass a test set by the Wise Old Elf before she can get a new one.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is ill and has red spots all over her face. Dr Brown Bear tells her she will be fine but she must stay in bed.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Shirley the Chicken is unbeatable at Bird Statues - until she comes up against a little owl named Odo.

programme.title: The Real Pup Squad
programme.desc: Elana and Meeka join The Real Pup Squad! There's a big mess in the garden. They need to clean up the litter and sort the recycling to help keep the garden safe and tidy.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty, and Lark are transported to the jungle to become real-life explorers! What will Milo and friends discover as they go on their adventure in search of valuable treasure.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a singer whose body has been left arranged in the same style as in one of his music videos.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a courier is killed while delivering a package, Castle and Beckett's investigations lead them to a murder covered-up years before.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: The Cornish Seal Sanctuary rehabilitates around 70 seal pups a year. Rescued seals receive treatment, medication and rehabilitation before moving out to the nursery pool.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Observing black grouse performing elaborate, competitive courtship displays to attract females. The strutting, stamping and calling advertise their strength and stature.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan explores Barry's Pleasure Park, 12th century Fonmon Castle - a former party palace - and meets dancer and Strictly star Amy Dowden who has spent many a summer enjoying the bay.

programme.title: Michael Portillo in Stockholm
programme.desc: Michael enjoys a cocktail at an ice bar before sculpting a leaping fish from an ice block and later explores Sweden's greatest - but ill-fated - warship which sank on its maiden voyage.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: During a packed shift, a 53-year-old chef suffers chest pains, an 84-year-old has had a fall on an escalator, and a farmer's been crushed by a bull from his herd.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits a tavern in Southampton which is at risk of closing its doors for good. Can she help this flailing pub get back on the map, harnessing a connection to the Titanic.

programme.title: Snatched: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: In 1991, Vicky Hamilton and Dinah McNicol vanished six months apart. The cases stayed cold until 2006, when Angelika Kluk's murder led to an arrest as DNA linked the perpetrator to all three.

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
programme.desc: The stories of two people who were sentenced to jail after their partners involved them serious crime, including Suzana who spent almost a year in a notorious Hong Kong prison.

programme.title: Murder 360
programme.desc: When four hikers go missing in the Appalachian Mountains, investigators suspect a serial killer is lurking in the forest. Time is running out before there is another victim.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Surrey, treasure hunting with Rowena and her daughter Savannah.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Jessica Wall are in Essex, treasure hunting with Sally and her son Luke.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: ...Joey. Joey is afraid to end his relationship with a diminutive woman who punches him every time she thinks something is funny.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey wonders if he is in love with Monica.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: Nick visits Malaysia, a country of contrasts - high tech, rural simplicity, megacities, virgin rainforest and many cultures. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on an adventure to find out what the clouds taste like. When they can't reach up to the sky, will they find another way to discover how they taste? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After banning Gaston from the castle, the elves and fairies are out looking for him when they discover a speaking door which leads to the dwarf mine. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are learning how to ski. Their teacher is a former world champion, but it's Mummy Pig who impresses.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Animated series about a loveable little pig. Peppa and George are playing with bubbles. Daddy Pig shows them how to make really big bubbles with an old tennis racket.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Tweedy and Fluff find a slide! Tweedy discovers that Fluff likes to go up rather than down until a bit of help and a lot of patience finally puts Fluff at the top. Will he give it a go.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: Squiggle joins his friends as they play trains in the hedgerow. There, Squiggle will learn all about forwards and backwards, slow and fast, as well as stop and go.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends: Extraordinary Engines
programme.desc: When a zeppelin comes flying over Sodor, Hugo is convinced that he is meant to fly too. But try as he might, he can't get off the ground..

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hannah turns the Pontypandy Ocean Parade into a race, an ocean rescue is required.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are at their playgroup. Madame Gazelle introduces a new pupil, Emily Elephant.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The Browns are off to the beach for their holiday and, on arrival, meet Shantee the lighthouse keeper.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy wake up disappointed when the snow they expected hasn't come. However, they soon invent ways to have snowy fun without actual snow.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party guests when a frightened Alien Boy zaps them into floating space bubbles.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Squirrely Whirly Playground. Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Bull builds a brand-new club house and slide for Peppa and her friends. It is a lovely Club House with a slide on the side.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is given the very important task of suggesting names for the new baby. She thinks of all sorts of names, but they aren't quite right.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: The bats that nest in Grandad's shed each year are missing. Can Stan and Gran encourage these nocturnal creatures to return when they can't hear them.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger mistakes a sloth for a monkey. He races the PAW Patrol to find it when it goes missing to cover up his blunder.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: When Milo, Lofty and Lark take over the curation of an exhibition at the museum, they accidentally send some important exhibits to be recycled.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After banning Gaston from the castle, the elves and fairies are out looking for him when they discover a speaking door which leads to the dwarf mine.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go on a day trip to Windy Castle, but Daddy Pig gets grumpy when he loses his way.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Odo comes up with tons of new business ideas for the camp's "jobs day," but none seem to work out until he starts thinking about what others need.

programme.title: Milkshake! Wesak
programme.desc: Kiera tells us all about the Buddhist festival of Wesak and together we find out some of the ways people around the world celebrate this occasion.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Join David in the Story Den to read Peppa's Dinosaur Party, a story in which Peppa and George visit Granny and Grandpa Pig to celebrate Dinosaur Day.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: After an Assistant DA is dropped from the fifth floor of a parking garage onto the street below, Castle and Beckett find his empty, single life is busier than it appeared.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The case of a man found stuffed into a garbage chute gets a lot more complicated when two separate women turn up to claim the body.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: In a Sunderland backyard, owner Paul Rodgers shows how easy it is to make a pond, how best to plant it, and discusses the wide variety of nature that can come to these backyard oases.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: EkoJoe is a community market garden in Leicester that brings together locals who grow seasonal produce, fostering sustainable growing practices, including maintaining beehives.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan celebrates engineer Isambard Kingdom Brunel, learns about the '60s Bristol Bus Boycott, and visits Chipping Campden and Blenheim Palace. And she enjoys a shin kicking competition.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: Cops hunt a criminal after reports he rammed a police car. And a PC alerted to a suspicious motor, discovers the driver's holdall packed with foreign cigarettes.
